steps.title: Undo the added constant
steps.content:
Start with the given equation:
$$
15x+45=180
$$
Subtract $45$ from both sides to keep the same solution.

steps.title: Simplify the equivalent equation
steps.content: After subtracting, the equation becomes $$ 15x=180-45=135 $$ So the equation with the same solution is $15x=135$. The answer is C.
